slides.heading: Welcome to SuperPlus Hub
slides.subtext: Your work app for the store
slides.caption: Use Hub every shift to see your work, talk with the team, and leave clear notes.
bullets: Check it when you start your shift
Use it instead of scattered WhatsApp messages
Ask a manager if anything looks wrong
slides.narrationScript: Hey! I'm Keisha. Welcome to SuperPlus Hub — this is your new app for work. Let me show you around.

slides.heading: Tasks
slides.caption: Tasks are the work your manager needs completed, with the details in one place.
bullets: Open a task to see the steps
Tap Need Help if you are stuck
slides.narrationScript: This is Tasks. When your manager gives you something to do, it shows up here. Tap to see it, mark it done when you're finished.

slides.heading: Threads
slides.caption: Threads keep store conversations together so important messages are easy to find.
bullets: Reply when a manager asks a question
Mention someone when you need their attention
slides.narrationScript: This is Threads — like a group chat for your store. Ask questions, share updates. No more missed messages.

slides.heading: Logbook
slides.caption: The Logbook helps the next shift understand what changed, what broke, and what needs follow-up.
slides.narrationScript: The Logbook is where you write down what happened on your shift. Anything the next person needs to know goes here.

slides.heading: Tools
slides.caption: Tools help you do common store jobs faster without hunting for another app.
slides.narrationScript: These are your Tools — a calculator, product lookup, and other things to make your job easier.

slides.heading: Start your first shift
slides.caption: Next, Hub will point out the main buttons. After that, you are ready to work from the app.
bullets: Ask your manager if you need help
slides.narrationScript: That's it! You're all set. If you ever need to see this again, go to your Profile. Let's get started!

walkthrough.title: Tasks
walkthrough.tooltip: Start here to see work assigned to you and any open tasks your store needs done.

walkthrough.title: Threads
walkthrough.tooltip: Use Threads for team messages, questions, updates, and follow-ups that should not get lost.

walkthrough.title: Logbook
walkthrough.tooltip: Write shift notes here so the next person knows what happened and what still needs attention.

walkthrough.title: Tools
walkthrough.tooltip: Find store helpers here, like product lookup, calculators, checklists, and issue reports.
